dialogueLines.speaker: Duke
dialogueLines.dialogueText: Uhh, hello there… can I get something to-

dialogueLines.speaker: Duke
dialogueLines.dialogueText: *HUAAWRK*

dialogueLines.speaker: Duke
dialogueLines.dialogueText: ...drink?

dialogueLines.speaker: Ted
dialogueLines.dialogueText: YO! Bobby! Look alive!

dialogueLines.speaker: Abby
dialogueLines.dialogueText: See Mister? I told you someone would eventually come!

dialogueLines.speaker: Bobby
dialogueLines.dialogueText: Oh Abby, did you drink something from the back again?

dialogueLines.speaker: Bobby
dialogueLines.dialogueText: You really need to stop having these delus-

dialogueLines.speaker: Bobby
dialogueLines.dialogueText: WHAT IN THE SAM HILL!!!

dialogueLines.speaker: Bobby
dialogueLines.dialogueText: ANYTHING! LITERALLY ANYTHING IS YOURS!

dialogueLines.speaker: Bobby
dialogueLines.dialogueText: LIQUOR, SPRITES, BEERS, VODKA, YOU NAME IT, WE GOT IT!!

dialogueLines.speaker: Bobby
dialogueLines.dialogueText: ANY OF THEM FOR JUST ONE CENT!

dialogueLines.speaker: Bobby
dialogueLines.dialogueText: WE’LL MOVE HEAVENS AND EARTH TO IMPRESS YOU!

dialogueLines.speaker: Duke
dialogueLines.dialogueText: ... some water please?

dialogueLines.speaker: Bobby
dialogueLines.dialogueText: IT WILL BE THE GREATEST WATER OF YOUR LIFE!

dialogueLines.speaker: Ted
dialogueLines.dialogueText: The funny thing’s that we didn’t even have half of those things in stock.

dialogueLines.speaker: Abby
dialogueLines.dialogueText: Howdy traveler! What be your name?

dialogueLines.speaker: Duke
dialogueLines.dialogueText: I’m… I’m Duke.

dialogueLines.speaker: Abby
dialogueLines.dialogueText: Duke? What a colorful little name!

dialogueLines.speaker: Ted
dialogueLines.dialogueText: Lovely is certainly a way of describing it.

dialogueLines.speaker: Abby
dialogueLines.dialogueText: That bundle of joy is Ted. I’m Abby. Bobby is our fearless hero!

dialogueLines.speaker: Ted
dialogueLines.dialogueText: Not much of a backbone if the flesh is all gone.

dialogueLines.speaker: Duke
dialogueLines.dialogueText: Something happened to cause that?

dialogueLines.speaker: Ted
dialogueLines.dialogueText: Capitalism.

dialogueLines.speaker: Ted
dialogueLines.dialogueText: Capitalism happened.

dialogueLines.speaker: Abby
dialogueLines.dialogueText: A big company came and took over everything.

dialogueLines.speaker: Ted
dialogueLines.dialogueText: Except us. For obvious reasons.

dialogueLines.speaker: Bobby
dialogueLines.dialogueText: Order Up!

dialogueLines.speaker: Bobby
dialogueLines.dialogueText: So? How does the water taste?

dialogueLines.speaker: Duke
dialogueLines.dialogueText: Just like water. Just the way I like it.

dialogueLines.speaker: Duke
dialogueLines.dialogueText: Say… if I wanted a job here-

dialogueLines.speaker: Bobby
dialogueLines.dialogueText: YOU’RE HIRED!!!

dialogueLines.speaker: Bobby
dialogueLines.dialogueText: You’ll be an unpaid volunteer!

dialogueLines.speaker: Ted
dialogueLines.dialogueText: That sounds a lot like slavery.

dialogueLines.speaker: Bobby
dialogueLines.dialogueText: We offer free food!

dialogueLines.speaker: Duke
dialogueLines.dialogueText: Sounds delicious…
